completed_work: Added l0_candidate_diagnostics to report valid L0 summary records as candidate sources.
Added tests for valid records, context_match, invalid records, missing store, stdout JSON, and output-file JSON.
key_decisions: The GAP-0001 first implementation slice is diagnostic-only and read-only.
L0 candidate diagnostics must report selection_effect none and must not modify context selection or provider prompts.
next_actions: Decide whether the next GAP-0001 slice should connect diagnostics to latest-context manifests or add richer candidate scoring while preserving selection_effect none.
risks: The diagnostic only scans L0 stores; it does not yet derive L0 candidates from selected L1/context relationships.
summary_text: Read-only L0 candidate diagnostics are implemented under admitted PLAN-20260705-0001 and WARR-20260705-0001. The new diagnostic module scans an L0 store for valid L0 summary records and reports candidate sources with selection_effect none. It can optionally mark context_match against supplied context item IDs, reports invalid records as non-fatal dropped entries, and handles missing stores without failure. The CLI scripts/diagnose_l0_candidates.py emits JSON to stdout or an output file. This slice intentionally does not alter provider prompts, context selection, or latest-context behavior. Focused diagnostic tests passed with 6 tests, self-model tests passed with 26 tests, and the full suite passed with 301 tests before commit f0691d2.
